title: The Adventures of Surprise Mouse and Friends
summary: Surprise Mouse and Plotty Mouse wake up and head to the store for a vegetable-buying mission. After purchasing carrots and broccoli and returning home for a spaghetti dinner, the friends are joined by Mischief Mouse for a long car ride. They pass the time listening to Frog and Toad stories and singing mouse songs before finally arriving at Nana Mouse's house, which is filled with an endless supply of toys to play with.

highlightQuote.text: Ah-la-la-la-la-la-la-la, jingle I would said, the orange jingle I would said, that's how it goes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, do you want to make up a story together?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I want to tell a story.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You want me to tell a story?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Story about Surprise Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh. Once upon a time, Surprise Mouse woke up in his fort. And he stretched (yawn) and he got up and he went outside and then he saw something very surprising. What did he see?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: A mouse friend!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A mouse friend. Which mouse friend was it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It was Plotty Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It was Plotty Mouse and Surprise Mouse said "Hi Plotty Mouse, what you doing?" And what did Plotty Mouse say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'm walking. Do you want to walk with me?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Surprise Mouse said "Yes I would love to walk with you. Where are you walking to?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The gro- no, no, the store.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The store. What you gonna buy at the store?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: What to buy carrots.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Carrots. That sounds good because I need some broccoli, so maybe we can go together and I'll buy broccoli and you buy carrots. Let's go! And then Surprise Mouse and Plotty Mouse were walking together to the store but suddenly they saw something very surprising on the sidewalk. What did they see?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They didn't see anything on the sidewalk.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They didn't? Huh. Well, they kept walking and then they got to the traffic light. And then they waited for all the traffic to go by and the light to turn red and then they crossed the street and then they kept going and then they made it to...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: ...the store!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And they went inside the store. And the first thing they saw was...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: ...the broccoli!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so Surprise Mouse said "Great, there's the broccoli. What were you going to get again Plotty Mouse?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Carrots.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so Surprise Mouse and Plotty Mouse walked around looking for the carrots. But instead they found...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They didn't find anything in grocery store.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They didn't find anything in the grocery store? Were there any carrots though?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Plotty said "Aha, here are the carrots." And then they went to the checkout line and then they bought their broccoli and their carrots. And then what did they do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They went back home and ate.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They went back home and ate their vegetables. Did they have anything with them?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They had some tomatoes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, and what else?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Cucumber.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that's starting to sound good. What else was in their food?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Spaghetti.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Mmm, broccoli, carrots, tomato, cucumber and spaghetti. What a delicious meal. And then what did they do after they ate?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They played.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: What did they play?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They played the dice game. Now let's make up another story about Plotty Mouse and Mischief Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Plotty Mouse and Mischief Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And Surprise Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Plotty Mouse and Mischief Mouse and Surprise Mouse had a big problem one day. What was their problem?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They didn't have any problem.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They didn't? Oh, but for the story I was thinking we could start the story with them having a problem.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No they didn't start with a problem.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh. What happens in the story?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They go on an adventure.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh they go on an adventure. Okay, let's start over again. Surprise Mouse and Plotty Mouse and Mischief Mouse go on an adventure. Where are they going to go?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Going to go to their Nana's house. They're going to drive in the car.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They're going to drive in the car to their Nana's house. And they get in the car and they drive, drive, drive, drive. And what do they do while they're driving?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They listen to story music.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, what story music do they listen to?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Lots of all the kinds.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: All the kinds? Like what? Maybe a Winnie the Pooh story?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Maybe a Daniel Tiger story?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Maybe a Frog and Toad story?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Maybe a Pout-Pout Fish story?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Maybe an enchanted goblin story?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No. Song about mice.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A song about mice. Of course that's what the mice listen to in the car. A song about mice. They love songs about mice. How'd the song go?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Ah-la-la-la-la-la-la-la, jingle I would said, the orange jingle I would said, that's how it goes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, well, they enjoyed their mice song in their mice car on the way to Nana Mouse's house. And they drove and drove and drove some more and then they stopped to pee and then they got back in the car and they drove and drove and drove and then they stopped to have a snack and then they got back in the car and drove and drove and drove and drove and drove and then finally they got to...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: ...Nana's house!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And they got out and Nana Mouse said "Hello everyone, welcome to my house! Come on inside." And what did they see inside Nana Mouse's house?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Lots of all these kind of toys.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, what kind of toys?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: All kinds of toys.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, did they play?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes they played with their Nana. The end. Now let's turn off the stories.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay. I'll flip them over and I'll turn on our light.

characters.name: Surprise Mouse
characters.description: A creative mouse inhabiting a sturdy fabric fortress, where they transform the brittle gold of autumn leaves into intricate art while navigating a life punctuated by sudden, marvelous surprises.

characters.name: Plotty Mouse
characters.description: A wandering soul with a penchant for long rambles and the crisp snap of garden carrots. A loyal companion to Pinecone Mouse, they are a spirited fixture at every vegetable soup feast, relishing the steam of a shared pot and the earthy sweetness of harvested roots.

characters.name: Mischief Mouse
characters.description: Reigning from a purple-striped Jovian castle, this affable mouse King—a playful-named companion to Pinecone Mouse—is a seasoned adventurer, guardian of the Underground Library, and Hattie’s steadfast ally. Between savoring artisanal cheeses and awaiting a rugged cardboard replacement for his fragile Lego hat, he spends leisure hours meticulously constructing and gleefully smashing soaring towers. A pancake-loving monarch who once tended shop for mountain-dwelling traffic cones, his cosmic quests recently shifted from the stars to the speedway; having borrowed a tow truck from Mistress Mouse, he proved a formidable competitor who nearly clinched a stunning victory. Whether piloting starships or joining the group’s latest trek to Nana’s house, he remains a vigilant protector and devoted friend across the galaxy.

characters.name: Nana Mouse
characters.description: The welcoming grandmother mouse who has many toys.

places.name: Surprise Mouse's Fort
places.description: The home where the story begins.

places.name: The Store
places.description: A versatile apothecary and provisioner where Seeker procures heavy-lidded sleep potions and Hattie guides Victor toward his exhaustive list of non-hat essentials. The eclectic inventory doubles as a grocery for all sizes, where local mice browse for carrots alongside a larder of gluten-free broccoli prized for its refreshing silence. Tucked among these oddities are the Band-Aids that once stirred a flicker of temporary concern in Izzy.

places.name: Nana Mouse's House
places.description: A house filled with many toys, reached after a long car ride.
